heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 106–224, title IV, § 438(a)(8)114 Stat. 454June 20, 2000
label: 150 to 150g Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 106–224, title IV, § 438(a)(8)114 Stat. 454June 20, 2000
notes: Section 150, , , set forth governmental policy for protection of potatoes and tomatoes from golden nematode.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 162 Stat. 442
Section 150a, , , authorized Secretary of Agriculture to carry out operations to eradicate, suppress, control, or prevent spread of golden nematode.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 262 Stat. 443
Section 150b, , , related to inspections, quarantines, restrictions on planting, crop destruction, and compensation of growers.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 362 Stat. 443
Section 150c, , , made expenditure of funds discretionary with Secretary.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 462 Stat. 443
Section 150d, , , made State legislative action prerequisite to restrictions on or destruction of crops.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 562 Stat. 443
Section 150e, , , related to determination of amount of compensation paid to growers.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 662 Stat. 443
Section 150f, , , authorized expenditures, including employment of personnel, printing and binding, and purchase of vehicles.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 762 Stat. 443
Section 150g, , , directed that chapter be construed to supplement existing legislation.act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 862 Stat. 443

Short Title, , provided that act , enacting this chapter, could be cited as the “Golden Nematode Act”, prior to repeal by , , .Act June 15, 1948, ch. 471, § 962 Stat. 443Pub. L. 106–224, title IV, § 438(a)(8)114 Stat. 454June 15, 1948June 20, 2000
